title: Cluster
description: A regional grouping of one or more container instances on which you can run tasks and services.

clusterArn.description: The ARN that identifies the cluster.

clusterName.description: A user-generated string that you use to identify your cluster.

registeredContainerInstancesCount.description: The number of container instances registered into the cluster.

runningTasksCount.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the RUNNING state.

pendingTasksCount.description: The number of tasks in the cluster that are in the PENDING state.

activeServicesCount.description: The number of services in the cluster that are in an ACTIVE state.
